# Vulkan CMakeLists.txt

if(WIN32)
    set(VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include")

    set(VULKAN_LIB "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Win32/vulkan-1.lib")

    # Create an interface target for Vulkan
    add_library(vulkan INTERFACE)
    target_include_directories(vulkan INTERFACE ${VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR})
    target_link_libraries(vulkan INTERFACE ${VULKAN_LIB})

    # Set folder for organization in IDEs
    set_target_properties(vulkan PROPERTIES FOLDER ${THIRD_PARTY_FOLDER}/vulkan)
endif()
